$schema_note: Pick the entry with status=pending and lowest priority. Lower number = ship first. After publishing, set status=done and add a published field with date + URL.

priority_tiers.1: Companion content to the calculator and homepage — fast ranking wins because internal links and topical relevance are immediate.
priority_tiers.2: Compound deep-dives — evergreen pillar pages. These are what other articles link to.
priority_tiers.3: How-to / handling guides — high practical value, decent search volume, low competition.
priority_tiers.4: Comparison pages — high commercial intent. Saved for after authority builds.
priority_tiers.5: City × product matrix — local SEO. Lowest priority because they're easy to spin up but only useful once site has authority.
